description:
Launch readiness audit for hx-menu. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-menu-item** AND **hx-menu-divider** (`hx-menu/hx-menu-item.ts`, `hx-menu/hx-menu-divider.ts`). These are registered custom elements that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip them.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on ALL THREE: hx-menu, hx-menu-item, hx-menu-divider. Verify ARIA roles (menu/menuitem/separator pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Home, End, Enter/Space, Escape), screen reader announcements. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-menu-item and hx-menu-divider APIs too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports ALL THREE elements.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/` (includes hx-menu-item.ts, hx-menu-divider.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-menu.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (parent AND both sub-components)
- Doc page complete per template (all sub-component APIs documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (all three elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes
